name: Euro Solar Parks, Inc.
summary: Euro Solar Parks, Inc. develops, builds, and operates commercial solar power plants for the European solar energy market. The company, through its subsidiaries, offers engineering services for infrastructure projects in the fields of energy supply and telecommunications; and provides management services to the solar energy industry, as well as owns contractual rights to develop solar power plants in Serbia. Euro Solar Parks, Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Upper Saddle River, New Jersey. Euro Solar Parks, Inc. is a subsidiary of Greenfield Investments Ltd.
